note: Search/replace operation for binary HWP through rhwp. Default mode writes a new output file. Safe in-place mode is experimental and requires --in-place --backup --verify.

output.description: Required unless using --in-place. Must not be combined with --in-place.

backup.description: Top-level flag required for --in-place. Creates <input>.bak-<timestamp> before atomic replace.

verify.description: Top-level flag required for --in-place. Runs provider readback, semantic delta, and optional SVG evidence.
